.*.description: Control-rate multiply. Emits left * right as a float whenever inlet 0 fires.

inlets.doc: Left operand — fires the multiplication.
inlets.label: left

inlets.doc: Right operand — stored until next multiply.
inlets.label: right

.+.description: Control-rate add. Emits left + right as a float whenever inlet 0 fires.

inlets.doc: Left operand — fires the addition.
inlets.label: left

inlets.doc: Right operand — stored until next add.
inlets.label: right

.-.description: Control-rate subtract. Emits left - right as a float whenever inlet 0 fires.

inlets.doc: Left operand — fires the subtraction.
inlets.label: left

inlets.doc: Right operand — stored until next subtract.
inlets.label: right

./.description: Control-rate divide. Emits left / right as a float whenever inlet 0 fires; division by zero emits 0.

inlets.doc: Left operand — fires the division.
inlets.label: left

inlets.doc: Right operand — stored until next divide. Zero forces output to 0.
inlets.label: right

.b.description: Momentary button. Any input (bang/int/float) lights the button until the next GUI poll; emits a bang on every calculate tick.

inlets.doc: Press — bang/int/float all light the button.
inlets.label: trigger

.b.name: .b

outlets.doc: Bang emitted on every calculate tick.
outlets.label: out

.channelpressure.description: MIDI Channel Pressure (aftertouch) message generator. Emits a status/value MIDI packet on every value change.

inlets.doc: Aftertouch pressure value (also fires the output).
inlets.label: pressure

.channelpressure.name: .channelpressure

.controlchange.description: MIDI Control Change message generator. Emits a 3-byte status/controller/value packet on every value change.

inlets.doc: Controller value (also fires the output).
inlets.label: value

.controlchange.name: .controlchange

.counter.description: Step counter. Bang increments the current value by 'step' and emits it. Send 'reset' as a list to return to startValue.

inlets.doc: Bang to step / int to set the value / list 'reset' to return to startValue.
inlets.label: control

inlets.doc: Sets the increment used on each bang.
inlets.label: step

.counter.name: .counter

params.doc: Initial counter value (and the value 'reset' returns to).
params.name: startValue

.f.description: Float number box. Stores a float; inlet 0 sets-and-fires (bang re-emits the current value), inlet 1 sets silently.

inlets.doc: Sets the value and emits it; bang re-emits the current value.
inlets.label: set/bang

inlets.doc: Silently updates the stored value without emitting.
inlets.label: silent set

.f.name: .f

.ftom.description: Converts a frequency in Hz to its MIDI note number (with A4 == 69, fractional output).

inlets.doc: Frequency in Hz.
inlets.label: freq

.ftom.name: .ftom

.gate.description: Demultiplexer. Routes a value inlet to one of N outlets, selected by inlet 0. activeOutlet=0 silences output; 1-based otherwise.

inlets.doc: 1-based outlet index to forward to (0 = mute).
inlets.label: select

inlets.doc: Value inlet — accepts bang / int / float / list.
inlets.label: in

.gate.name: .gate

outlets.doc: Outlet 0 — emits the routed value when select == 1.
outlets.label: out0

outlets.doc: Outlet 1 — emits the routed value when select == 2.
outlets.label: out1

params.doc: Number of value outlets (additional outlets are created by SetParams).
params.name: numOutlets

.i.description: Integer number box. Stores an int; inlet 0 sets-and-fires (bang re-emits the current value), inlet 1 sets silently.

inlets.doc: Sets the value and emits it; bang re-emits the current value.
inlets.label: set/bang

inlets.doc: Silently updates the stored value without emitting.
inlets.label: silent set

.i.name: .i

.l.description: Static list. Bang re-sends the stored list; list updates the stored payload.

inlets.doc: Bang re-sends the stored list; list replaces it.
inlets.label: trigger/set

.l.name: .l

.m.description: Static message. Bang re-sends the stored message; list updates the stored payload.

inlets.doc: Bang re-sends the stored message; list replaces it.
inlets.label: trigger/set

.m.name: .m

outlets.doc: Stored message broadcast as a SetMessage.
outlets.label: out

.metro.description: Periodic bang generator. Once toggled on, emits a bang every 'period' milliseconds (and immediately on start). Toggle off to stop.

inlets.doc: Non-zero int starts the metronome; 0 stops it.
inlets.label: on/off

inlets.doc: Sets the bang interval in milliseconds.
inlets.label: period

.metro.name: .metro

.midiout.description: MIDI device output. Sends raw MIDI byte lists to the selected hardware port; understands 'allnotesoff', 'reset', 'omni on/off', 'poly on/off', and 'local control on/off' as control messages.

inlets.doc: Raw MIDI byte list to send to the device.
inlets.label: midi

.midiout.name: .midiout

params.doc: Index of the output MIDI port.
params.name: port

.mtof.description: Converts a MIDI note number (with A4 == 69) to its frequency in Hz.

inlets.doc: MIDI note number — fractional values are supported.
inlets.label: midi

.mtof.name: .mtof

.noteoff.description: MIDI Note-Off message generator. Inlet 0 fires the message; emits a 3-byte status/pitch/velocity packet as a list.

inlets.doc: MIDI note number (also fires the output).
inlets.label: pitch

inlets.doc: Release velocity (stored until next pitch).
inlets.label: velocity

.noteoff.name: .noteoff

outlets.doc: Encoded MIDI Note-Off message (status, pitch, velocity).
outlets.label: midi

.noteon.description: MIDI Note-On message generator. Inlet 0 fires the message; emits a 3-byte status/pitch/velocity packet as a list.

inlets.doc: MIDI note number (also fires the output).
inlets.label: pitch

inlets.doc: Note velocity (stored until next pitch).
inlets.label: velocity

.noteon.name: .noteon

outlets.doc: Encoded MIDI Note-On message (status, pitch, velocity).
outlets.label: midi

.polypressure.description: MIDI Polyphonic Key Pressure message generator. Inlet 0 fires the message with the stored pressure value.

inlets.doc: MIDI note number (also fires the output).
inlets.label: pitch

inlets.doc: Pressure value for the note (stored until next pitch).
inlets.label: pressure

.polypressure.name: .polypressure

outlets.doc: Encoded MIDI Poly Key Pressure message.
outlets.label: midi

.programchange.description: MIDI Program Change message generator. Emits a status/program packet on every value change.

inlets.doc: Program number (also fires the output).
inlets.label: program

.programchange.name: .programchange

.r.description: Named receive endpoint. Forwards values arriving from any matching gSend (same dataName) in the patcher.

inlets.doc: Wired inlet (rarely used — receives typically pair with gSend by name).
inlets.label: in

.r.name: .r

outlets.doc: Forwarded value from matching gSend nodes.
outlets.label: out

params.doc: Name to listen for; must match the dataName of one or more gSend nodes.
params.name: dataName

.random.description: Random integer generator. On bang, emits a uniformly distributed integer in [0, range).

inlets.doc: Trigger — emits a fresh random integer.
inlets.label: bang

inlets.doc: Sets the exclusive upper bound of the output range.
inlets.label: range

.random.name: .random

.route.description: Match-and-route. Compares the incoming value to each token in the list parameter and forwards to the matching outlet; unmatched values go to the final fall-through outlet. Outlets are created when the list parameter is set.

inlets.doc: Value inlet — accepts bang / int / float / list.
inlets.label: in

.route.name: .route

params.doc: Space-separated list of match tokens; one outlet is created per token plus one fall-through outlet.
params.name: list

.s.description: Named send endpoint. Broadcasts incoming values to every gReceive in the patcher whose dataName matches.

inlets.doc: Value inlet — accepts bang / int / float / list.
inlets.label: in

.s.name: .s

params.doc: Name to broadcast on; matching gReceive nodes will emit the forwarded value.
params.name: dataName

.slider.description: Slider control. Stores a normalized float in [0, 1]; ints/floats are clamped on input. Emits the stored value on every calculate tick.

inlets.doc: Sets the slider position; bang is a no-op trigger that still fires the output.
inlets.label: set/bang

.slider.name: .slider

.switch.description: Selector switch. Routes one of N value inlets to a single outlet, chosen by the index on inlet 0. The number of value inlets is set by the numInlets parameter.

inlets.doc: Index (0-based) of the value inlet to forward.
inlets.label: select

inlets.doc: Value inlet 0 — accepts bang / int / float / list.
inlets.label: in0

inlets.doc: Value inlet 1 — accepts bang / int / float / list.
inlets.label: in1

.switch.name: .switch

outlets.doc: Forwarded value from the currently selected inlet.
outlets.label: out

params.doc: Number of value inlets (additional inlets are created by SetParams).
params.name: numInlets

.t.description: Latching on/off toggle. Int sets the state directly (0 = off, non-zero = on); bang flips it. Emits 0 or 1 every calculate tick.

inlets.doc: Int sets state (0 = off, !=0 = on); bang flips the current state.
inlets.label: set/toggle

.t.name: .t

.text.description: Text label. Holds a string parameter for display; no inlets, no outlets — purely a visual annotation.
.text.name: .text

~*.description: Audio-rate multiply. Multiplies the left buffer by either the right buffer (audio-rate) or the right float (control-rate). The canonical 'gain' / ring-mod node.

inlets.doc: Left operand — audio buffer.
inlets.label: left

inlets.doc: Right operand — audio buffer or float (gain).
inlets.label: right

params.doc: Initial right-operand float (used until a buffer arrives on inlet 1).
params.name: right

~+.description: Audio-rate add. Sums the left buffer with either the right buffer (audio-rate) or the right float (control-rate).

inlets.doc: Left operand — audio buffer.
inlets.label: left

inlets.doc: Right operand — audio buffer or float.
inlets.label: right

params.doc: Initial right-operand float (used until a buffer arrives on inlet 1).
params.name: right

~-.description: Audio-rate subtract. Subtracts either the right buffer (audio-rate) or the right float (control-rate) from the left buffer.

inlets.doc: Left operand — audio buffer.
inlets.label: left

inlets.doc: Right operand — audio buffer or float.
inlets.label: right

params.doc: Initial right-operand float (used until a buffer arrives on inlet 1).
params.name: right

~/.description: Audio-rate divide. Divides the left buffer by either the right buffer (audio-rate) or the right float (control-rate). A right-float of 0 is silently treated as a no-op.

inlets.doc: Left operand — audio buffer.
inlets.label: left

inlets.doc: Right operand — audio buffer or float (non-zero).
inlets.label: right

params.doc: Initial right-operand float (used until a buffer arrives on inlet 1). 0 disables division.
params.name: right

~bp.description: Bandpass filter. Passes a frequency band centered on 'frequency' with bandwidth shaped by 'Q' (resonance).

inlets.doc: Audio input buffer.
inlets.label: in

inlets.doc: Center frequency in Hz.
inlets.label: freq

inlets.doc: Resonance / inverse bandwidth — higher narrows the band.
inlets.label: Q

~bp.name: ~bp

~hp.description: Single-pole highpass filter. Attenuates content below the cutoff frequency.

inlets.doc: Audio input buffer.
inlets.label: in

inlets.doc: Cutoff frequency in Hz.
inlets.label: cutoff

~hp.name: ~hp

~line.description: Linear-ramp generator. Ramps an audio-rate value toward a target over a given time in ms. The 'stop' message freezes the ramp at the current value.

inlets.doc: Target value to ramp toward.
inlets.label: target

inlets.doc: Ramp duration in milliseconds.
inlets.label: time

~line.name: ~line

~lp.description: Single-pole lowpass filter. Attenuates content above the cutoff frequency.

inlets.doc: Audio input buffer.
inlets.label: in

inlets.doc: Cutoff frequency in Hz.
inlets.label: cutoff

~lp.name: ~lp

~noise.description: White-noise generator. Emits a fresh DSP buffer of pseudo-random samples on every audio frame.
~noise.name: ~noise

~saw.description: Audio-rate sawtooth oscillator. Frequency can be set with a float or modulated with a DSP buffer.

inlets.doc: Oscillator frequency in Hz. Accepts a DSP buffer (FM) or a float.
inlets.label: freq

~saw.name: ~saw

~sine.description: Audio-rate sine oscillator. Frequency can be set with a float or modulated with a DSP buffer.

inlets.doc: Oscillator frequency in Hz. Accepts a DSP buffer (FM) or a float.
inlets.label: freq

~sine.name: ~sine

~vcf.description: Voltage-controlled (heterodyne) filter. Mixes the input with a center-frequency buffer; sharpness controls resonance. Emits real and imaginary components on two buffer outlets.

inlets.doc: Audio input buffer.
inlets.label: in

inlets.doc: Center-frequency buffer (typically a sine at the target frequency).
inlets.label: center

inlets.doc: Resonance / sharpness control.
inlets.label: sharpness

~vcf.name: ~vcf

outlets.doc: Real component of the filtered signal.
outlets.label: real

outlets.doc: Imaginary component of the filtered signal.
outlets.label: imag
